title: Brazilian Cheese Casserole
description: A rich and creamy casserole filled with gooey cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Gooey cheese blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of cheddar, mozzarella, and parmesan

ingredients.name: Intensely spiced ground beef
ingredients.notes: Cooked with cumin, chili powder, and paprika

instructions: In a large pan, cook the ground beef over medium heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the cumin, chili powder, and paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
In a separate bowl, combine the gooey cheese blend, beaten eggs, and melted butter.
In a 20cm (8 inch) square baking dish, create a layer of torn casserole bread.
Top the bread with the cooked ground beef mixture, followed by the cheese and egg mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
